results.rendered_html:
vi-√śliṣ P. Ā. -śliṣyati, ˚te, to be loosened or dissolved or relaxed,  Bhaṭṭ. ;  Kathās. ;
to be divided or separated (mithaḥ, ‘from each other’),  Kathās. ;
to fall wide of a mark, fail to strike, miss the aim,  Ratnāv. ;
to divide, separate from (abl.),  Kathās.  :
Caus. -śleṣayati, to cause to be disunited, separate from (abl.),  Kāv. ;  Pañcat. ;
to deprive of (instr.),  Pañcat.

viśliṣ 4 P.
1 To be separated, to be away from.
2 To burst, fly asunder;  R. 12. 76 ;  Bk. 14. 67. 
— Caus.
1 to separate;  Me. 7. 
2 To deprive of (instr.); buddhyā viśleṣayaṃti te  Pt. 3. 183.
